title: Scientific Research Donations
query: SELECT SUM(Count) AS total FROM ScientificResearch WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Name_Localised, Name) AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM ScientificResearch WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Name ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} material unit(s) donated to scientific research during the report period. Donating materials to research is quiet civic participation in the galaxy's science community — the contributions track your investment in community goals and the Pilots Federation's collective knowledge of the Milky Way.
details.help: ScientificResearch fires when materials are donated to a research station. total drives the title as the donation volume headline.

tagLines: Scientific research material donation log compiled. Contribution totals recorded with the research institutions.
The scientists needed it more than the engineer did. Sometimes that's the right call.
Materials you don't donate get crafted. Materials you do donate become someone else's discovery. Both matter.
